name: Kosher Cholent
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Concord Grape or dry red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the lima beans and soak overnight, then drain.
2. In a 5 quart pot, heat the fat and brown the onions. Remove the onions with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Rub the brisket with the garlic and paprika. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Brown the meat on all sides in the same pot.
5. Add the onions, potatoes, and lima beans to the pot. Sprinkle the flour over the top and pour in the wine.
6. Add enough water to cover the ingredients. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer.
7. Simmer for 4 hours, checking the water level occasionally (or bring to a boil and place in an oven preheated to 450°F for 30 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 250°F and bake for 1 hour.)
